revision.comment: new key for [[Category:Nuns by century]]: " 13" using [[WP:HC|HotCat]]
1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:refreshing imported pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Text replacement - "(?<!<noinclude>)\{\{\s*[dD]raft categories\|([^}]+)\}\}(?!<\/noinclude>)" to "<noinclude>{{Draft categories|\1}}</noinclude> "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
revision.text:
==Old Content== {{Navseasoncats}} {{CatAutoTOC}} <noinclude>{{Draft categories|
}}</noinclude>
==Categories==
[[en:13th-century nuns]] [[en:Category:13th-century nuns]] [[ja:13th-century nuns]] {{wikidata link|Q83497878}} [[Category:13th-century women by occupation|Nuns]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Medieval nuns| ]] [[Category:Nuns by century| 13]] [[Category:Original categories]]

revision.comment: adding dummy category to make categories work
revision.text:
==Old Content== {{Navseasoncats}} {{CatAutoTOC}} <noinclude>{{Draft categories|
}}</noinclude>
==Categories==
[[en:13th-century nuns]] [[en:Category:13th-century nuns]] [[ja:13th-century nuns]] {{wikidata link|Q83497878}} [[Category:13th-century women by occupation|Nuns]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Medieval nuns| ]] [[Category:Nuns by century| 13]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:pages]]

revision.comment: Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Navseasoncats}}
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{Draft categories|

}}
{{wikidata link|Q83497878}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:13th-century nuns]]
[[en:Category:13th-century nuns]]
[[ja:13th-century nuns]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:13th-century women by occupation|Nuns]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]
[[Category:Medieval nuns| ]]
[[Category:Nuns by century| 13]]
